entry.title: Re: User exit in S/4HANA Public Cloud（COMD）
entry.content:
Hi,

 

user exits were done before ABAP OO existed.

Since ABAP OO, SAP has offered BAdIs. There are also cloud BAdIs that SAP offers. You can use any of these BAdIs for custom coding.

 

The find the list of available BAdIs here: https://api.sap.com/package/S4HANACloudBADI/badi

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: Mandatory lower level WBS elements
entry.content:
Dear Friend's

Could you help me indicating if is it possible to use PS validation to be mandatory lower level WBS elements creation only using functional configuration?

For example, I am creating a Project Definition and Level 1 WBS element but I need to validate if Level 2 and Level 3 WBS element has been created.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Companion for Desktop - VPN
entry.content:
Hi Annie,

If the content is appearing in SAP Companion for Desktop when you SAP GUI runs from your Desktop but not when you run through your VPN, I suspect that the issue is that SAP Companion for Desktop is not able to recognise the application functionality when you have your VPN turned on.  When you turn on your VPN, do you connect to a remote Desktop and launch SAP from the remote Desktop?  If you do, you need a version of SAP Companion for Desktop running on the remote Desktop because SAP Companion for Desktop needs to run from the same Desktop as the application to be able to recognise the application functionality.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Block transaction by Cost Centers budget
entry.content: How to block transactions the deviate from project budget?

entry.title: Re: JSON to XML Converter in SAP Cloud Integration raises...
entry.content:
Hello  @inturidevendra ,

I'm not entirely sure if I understand correctly, but I believe you're asking if you need to remove white spaces from your payload. Is that correct? This is really easy with groovyscript you can also add this code to delete non ASCII characters.

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
import java.util.HashMap;
import groovy.json.JsonSlurper

def Message processData(Message message) {
//Body
def body = message.getBody(java.lang.String) as String;
def cleanedPayload = body.replaceAll(/[\s\u4E00-\u9FA5]/, "");
message.setBody(cleanedPayload);

return message;
}

 

This is the Output ==>

entry.title: Re: Error while deploying multi tenant app
entry.content: Were you able to solve this?

entry.title: Change SAP Solution Manager System Role from Test sytsem to Prodcution system
entry.content:
We completed all the Manadatory configuration based on SAP Solution Manager System Role as Test system. But now Customer wants to change the system role to prodcution. 

Can we change SAP Solution Manager System Role from Test sytsem to Prodcution system in System preparation.

Will it cause any impact on the configuration what we did in the Manadatory configuration.

What would be the impact if we change to system role to production.

Please help us on this issue


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Change SAP Solution Manager System Role from Test syt...
entry.content:
Hello,

 

You can check the following Help Text to learn about the difference between non-production and production systems in System preparation -> Step 1 Define System Role, and then you can decide to change the system role.

-----------------

The actions of the following steps are performed differently on a production system and a non-production system:

  • All steps regarding implementation of SAP Notes
  • All steps in which you create or edit users for the SAP Solution Manager system
  • The Schedule Jobs step under Cross Scenario Configuration > Mandatory Configuration > Basic Configuration

For example, on a non-production system, like a quality assurance system, SAP Notes are implemented with transaction SNOTE by default instead of being transported. The user roles are copied and updated by default instead of being transported, and scheduling of some jobs that interact with SAP Support Portal can be suspended. If you plan to transport changes of your non-production system, you can change the default behavior under Advanced Options.

Default System Options

The Default System Options section is visible after you select a system role.

-----------------

 

If, after you change the system role, you get an authorization problem in subsequent configurations, you can check the KBA 2365884.

##2365884 - Warning "User * has no user admin. authorization to create or update users" even though updating the user with guided popup

 

Best regards,

Leo

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: How to get started with the Test Automation Tool for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Re: I am not able to connect to Enable Now Manager from S...
entry.content:
Hi,

I suspect that your SAP Companion configuration is incorrect or you do not have write access to the Workarea in Manager where the content is to be written.  Please read this post in the community to see if you can identify the issue and if not, post an image showing your current SAP Companion configuration.  I particularly interested in the configuration for the serviceLayerVersion and dataUrlSEN2 parameters but also the learningAppBackendUrl and learningAppWorkspace parameters.

Regards
Shane

"" - this is the issue.

entry.title: Converting Existing Documents to PDF Using SAP Business One Service Layer Commands
entry.content: We have past documents that need to be converted into PDF format. One option we are considering for batch PDF creation is the Service Layer. What is the command request for this process?

entry.title: Re: How to disable adding Delivery without base doc (Sale...
entry.content:
Hi,

Use Transaction Notification to block, try this

IF :object_type = '15' and :transaction_type = 'A' 							
	THEN
		BEGIN
			IF EXISTS ( 
						select T0."DocEntry" from ODLN T0 inner join DLN1 T1 on T0."DocEntry"=T1."DocEntry"	
						where T0."DocEntry" = :list_of_cols_val_tab_del
							and T0."CANCELED"='N'
							and T0."DocType"='I'
							and T1."BaseType"=-1
						) 
			THEN
				BEGIN
						error := 1501;
						error_message := N'This Delivery is not linked to Base Document, check again.';
				END;
			END IF;

		END;
	END IF;

Hope this helps,

Son Tran

entry.title: Oracle Profile parameter changes for SAPUPROF
entry.content:
Hi SAP, 

During the Security audit it is recommended for update the below profile parameters for Oracle Database. 

Could you please let us know if there are any impact while changing the parameters and let us know how we can change the parameters to applicable for SAPUPROF profiles. Thanks

 

OraclePASSWORD_REUSE_TIME365PASSWORD_VERIFY_FUNCTIONEnableFAILED_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS5PASSWORD_LIFE_TIME90IDLE_TIME30PASSWORD_LOCK_TIME0

Please check and update us asap so that will change the audit parameters asap. Thanks 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Oracle Profile parameter changes for SAPUPROF
entry.content:
Please refer to below SAP note to understand the profile:

1519872 - SAP Database User Profile SAPUPROF

And you can change the parameter under SAPUPROF, for example FAILED_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS.
And there is no impact ONLY IF the user password matched the parameter/SAPUPROF.

For example, FAILED_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS =5. If sap schema user, sapsr3 failed to log on database five times,
the sapsr3 will be blocked, which results your SAP will not able to connect database.

All in all, you can change SAPUPROF's parameter, but do ensure you meet the policy, otherwise sapr3 user will be blocked,
once the SAPUPROF's parameter is violated.

entry.title: Re: Oracle Profile parameter changes for SAPUPROF
entry.content: how to change can refer to sap kba 2286491

entry.title: Re: Oracle Profile parameter changes for SAPUPROF
entry.content: how to change, for example SAP KBA: 2286491alter profile <SAP_PROFILE> limit IDLE_TIME unlimited;

entry.title: Re: Oracle Profile parameter changes for SAPUPROF
entry.content: how to change check SAP KBA how to change, for example SAP KBA: 2286491 alter profile <SAP_PROFILE> limit IDLE_TIME unlimited;

entry.title: How to update Config data via CRM_ORDER_MAINTAIN ?
entry.content:
HI,


I am new to CRM and aims to create "Solution Quotations" through a mass upload custom program.

I've discovered that the CRM_ORDER_MAINTAIN FM is responsible for creating Solution Quotations when debugged the Std. Fiori app.

So, I tried using this FM in my custom program, but encountered difficulties when passing the CONFIG (Material Characteristics) to this FM. Despite debugging the standard Fiori App, I couldn't figure out how to feed the config data to CRM_ORDER_MAINTAIN or find an alternative method. During debugging the std. App, I noticed that certain fields (CUVAL / CUINS / CUREF) were not filled, leaving only INT_OBJ_NO of CUCFG filled but somehow the rest being retrieved from buffer.

Despite extensive debugging efforts, I am stuck and seek advice from CRM technical experts.

I am deeply passionate about learning and development, and I believe that SAP's diverse learning journeys and certifications will play a pivotal role in advancing my professional growth in this field.

entry.title: 【Emergency】 Outputting ledger sheets using GUI application
entry.content:
伝票のPDFをGUIアプリで出力したいのですが、ヘッダー出力プレビューを押しても一部のテキストが表示されません(参考1)。
私は2つの解決策を試しました。
1つ目は、PDFを一度ローカル環境にダウンロードし、Adobe Acrobat Readerにアップロードする方法です。しかし、文字は日本語ではなく中国語で表示されていました(文献2)。
2つ目は、PDFリーダー拡張機能をChromeに適用することです。ただし、一部の文字は表示されません。

GUIアプリケーションを使って帳票を出力する場合、ヘッダ出力プレビューを押した時に、日本語の文字で一気にきれいに表示したい。
これらのイベントの解決策は何ですか?

参照1:

 

 

参照2:

entry.title: Re: What are the advantages & disadvantages of making an...
entry.content: Thanks Thiago valadao

entry.title: Activating Embedded AI – Intelligent GRIR Reconciliation
entry.content:
Use Case: All goods and invoice receipts are collected on GR/IR accounts. If amounts and prices match, they are automatically cleared by the system. However, not all items can be cleared automatically, for various reasons:

  • Invoice or goods receipt is missing
  • Amounts do not match
  • Purchase order item was created with an outdated price list
  • Delivery costs were posted on the wrong GR/IR account

The GR/IR account reconciliation process is an exception-handling process for all purchase order items with differences between goods receipts and invoice receipts. This is a highly manual process that delays the period-end closing.

 Business Benefits:

  • Increase the GR/IR matching rate
  • Lower manual efforts
  • Increase efficiency of end users
  • Accelerate the period-end closing

Service Type: This is a Machine Learning service which means machine is expecting training data. It does not mean that you need to create data, since the S/4HANA system is expected to have  historical records of reconciled GR/IR accounts, and specifically manual assignments of purchase order items.

What is the outcome? The proposal service with machine learning automatically proposes next steps for items that could not be matched, based on the status and situation of a purchase order item. For intelligent GR/IR accounts reconciliation, proposals are made for Priority, Status, Root Cause, Processor, and Processing Department.

Configuration Steps:

Environment: S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 and BTP

Frontend : Fiori App Reconcile GR/IR Accounts.

Prerequisite: It is expected you have a sub-account in SAP BTP and have entitlements and quotas for subaccounts (refer to help doc if you need more info)

Provided you have the above the following steps are specific for the AI configuration:

  1. Create Service Instance and Keys

In BTP-->Under Services-->Open Service Marketplace --> Choose Data Attribute Recommendation tile

 Create a new service instance by choosing Create

Select the plan Intelligent Accounting, fill in the desired instance name and choose Create (since this is an internal system – I have “free” plan, please don’t expect the same at your end)

Select Next to create Service Key

Sample Code

{

"url":"",

"uaa": {

"clientid":"",

"clientsecret": "",

"url": ""

}

}

Review and click create

A json file will be created, please note the below for the next steps:

Host Name

url

OAuth 2.0 Endpoint

uaa.url

OAuth 2.0 Token Endpoint

uaa.url + “oauth/token”

Username

uaa.clientid

Password

uaa.clientsecret

2. Create RFC Destination

In SAP S/4HANA system run transaction SM59 and create a connection of type G (HTTP Connection to External Server).

For example:

  • For DESTINATION_PROPOSALS, use path prefix /

Ensure you do a connection test post saving the RFC, this will tell you if the host URL you entered is correct or not. I used the uaa URL

Run transaction OA2C_CONFIG and create the oauth client for the profile FIS_GRIR_ML, which consists of the client ID, client secret and URL specified in the step1 (JSON file)

In the Access Settings section of the client, select the following values:

Setting

Value

Client Authentication

Basic

Resource Access Authentication

Header Field

Selected Grant Type

Client Credentials

Run transaction S4ML_GRIR_SETUP, and specify the RFC destination DESTINATION_PROPOSALS that you created before (the program throws an error since it expect Health RFC as well, specify same RFC for both)

Activate the Save checkbox to save the configurations for use

3. Setup jobs 

This is the last step, there are 3 jobs to be scheduled:

Training job

Call up transaction SM36 or choose System  Services  Jobs  Define Job.

When choosing the job wizard for scheduling the training job, you enter a job name and choose Continue.

Choose ABAP program step and enter FIS_GRIR_ML_DAR_TRAIN as ABAP program name and choose Continue.

To set the running schedule according to your requirement, choose one of the start conditions for the job definition.

See Job log- if there is no data for training, the log will show 0 data selected. In order for machine to learn, there need to be some data set in the system

 

Inference Job

Call up transaction SM36 or choose System  Services  Jobs  Define Job.

When choosing the job wizard for scheduling the training job, you enter a job name and choose Continue.

Choose ABAP program step and enter FIS_GRIR_ML_DAR_INFERE as ABAP program name and choose Continue.

To set the running schedule according to your requirement, choose one of the start conditions for the job definition.

Monitor Job

all up transaction SM36 or choose System  Services  Jobs  Define Job.

When choosing the job wizard for scheduling the training job, you enter a job name and choose Continue.

Choose ABAP program step and enter FINS_ML_DAR_MONI as ABAP program name and choose Continue. (The guide has misspelled the job as FIS_ML_DAR_MONI -> please take note)

To set the running schedule according to your requirement, choose one of the start conditions for the job definition.

     You might want to set the frequency for running this job to every 10 minutes

Output:

Once the model is trained, in the FIORI app you should be able to see proposals made for Priority, Status, Root Cause, Processor, and Processing Department. If there is no data these fields will remain empty on the app.

Let us know how you go at your end by adding your views under comments.

entry.title: Model concept in SAC considering connection with S4 HANA
entry.content:
Hello experts

 

What I want to know

While I'm considering model design in SAC in data flow perspective, came up with several approaches.

I tried to search: what is the recommended way by SAP? and what is the best practice? but could not find. 

I'd like to hear advice from the experts here.

 

Point

- Considering actual data souse coming from S4

- Plan to export budget data to S4 from each models such as Revenue, Cost/OPEX, CAPEX

 

Approach#1

- Create "Data hub model" in SAC for receiving all actual data, then send filtered data to each models.

 

Approach#2

- Import filtered data from S4 to each models in SAC

 

Approach#3

- Import un-filtered data from S4 to each models in SAC

 

Please help me experts, thanks in advance.

SAP Analytics Cloud  SAP Analytics Cloud, data modeling  SAP Analytics Cloud, connectivity

entry.title: Re: I am not able to connect to Enable Now Manager from S...
entry.content: If you see the message "...It is currently owned by ." with no name specified then you are trying to create content in a Workarea that you do not have write access to (as Shane mentioned). Most likely you are trying to create content in the SAP standard content Workarea, and not your own. Make sure dataUrlSEN2 specifies your own Workarea, and that you are running in EXT mode. (Or set dataUrlSEN and run in WPB/SEN mode).

entry.title: Re: Guided Tours tab not visible to learners
entry.content:
Guided Tours will be visible if the context matches and they are published (assuming you are pointing to the correct Workarea and you have read permissions on it). The context is:

  • Language
  • App ID
  • Product
  • Version

Check each of those things. If the Context Help is showing up but not the GTs then check the values for the CT and copy them to the GTs. (The App ID is also specified inside the help project, so if you've been duplicating and manually changing the Context property that is not enough...)

entry.title: Re: Application Job does not working with Check Exit - BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content: Hi, Any luck for this issue ?

entry.title: Re: How to use CDS View in Calculation View?
entry.content:
The business logic of CDS view is relying on a session variable called CDS_CLIENT to filter the data depeding on the slient number. When accessing the CDS view via the ABAP layer, this session variable is automatically provided by the kernel. When accessing the CDS view via SDA (hanaodbc driver), it is missing by default and that explains why you get no data because it filter based on a client number that is blank.
One workaround is to add this missing session variable in the extra properties of your SDA remote source with the following syntax (SESSIONVARIABLE:CDS_CLIENT=<client-number> , example SESSIONVARIABLE:CDS_CLIENT=001 )

This workaround is not the recommended solution by SAP. Instead of using hanaodbc adapter, you should use the abapodbc one. Unfortunately, this abapodbc driver is only available on hana cloud for the time being. Using this adapter, it has also the advantage that it allows to create virtual tables on top of CDS views having parameters (see https://help.sap.com/docs/hana-cloud-database/sap-hana-cloud-sap-hana-database-data-access-guide/virtualizing-parameterized-sql-views )

entry.title: SAP Business One V10 SQL API
entry.content:
Good Day

We are busy moving from SAP B1 V8 to V10 SQL Server. Is there a REST API available where I can call procedures via HTTP REST interface on SQL Server version? We write our own 3rd party programs. I can only see that there is a REST API on HANA and not SQL. Please can someone guide me in the right direction. 

Regards

Ruan

entry.title: SAP SAC Scheduled Custom Widget
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I've been exploring the setup of a scheduled task within SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) to run / trigger a customized widget within SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC).

The aim is to utilize this widget within SAP SAC to transform a CSV file into an Excel format while preserving the formatting of tables within the story (including colors, fonts, etc.). Subsequently, this Excel file will be distributed via email to both SAC and non-SAC users as a publication.

I'm curious to know if there are viable options to leverage the REST API functionalities within BTP to execute the custom widget within SAP SAC and subsequently distribute publications to both SAC and non-SAC users.

Your insights and guidance on this matter would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Info Record issue

The info record for the material is created for 2000 USD for example and later the vendor gave a new price like 3000 USD is there any way that this new price of 3000 USD will automatically update in the info record when we do MIGO? Please advise.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Exploring SAP Extensibility - Types of Extensibilities
entry.content: @filipebst  - A good blog covers the whole extensibility concept at a high level.

entry.title: Re: How to execute a native sql query from abap program o...
entry.content: you have to embed your HANA Calculation view into an ABAP CDS view that you will be able to consume from ABAP programs. You can refer to the following blog https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/how-to-consume-hana-calculation-views-in-s-4hana-cds-views/ba-p/13476798

entry.title: Re: How to create custom OData service in S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
Hello,

Yes, you can create your own Odata service or a rest endpoint using the RAP framework in the 3SL system.

You should have a user in your development system with tenant 080, assign the tenant a developer role, and then connect the tenant with your ADT.

There, you can develop the full-fledged implementation of your choice based on the RAP framework, the only recommended cloud framework.

Please let me know if you need more info.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration Looping Process Call
entry.content:
Hi DenizZilyas,

 

what if we still have more records to fetch but loop max iteration value reached? In such scenario How to fetch missing records?

entry.title: Re: Full update of 0CO_OM_WBS_3 does not work. I get only...
entry.content:
Hi, 

If note 2880477 - Compat-Views/Timestamp: Leap Days not Correct cannot solve the issue, it's recommended to open a SAP case under BW-BCT-CO-OM for further help. Please also provide the recent missing document numbers and the remote connection in the case.

Regards,
Maggie

entry.title: How to Cancel test tenant creation service request and impact of cancellation
entry.content:
a request was created a day ago and its status is showing that "Downtime Passed". see attachment. downtime date 09-April-2024 was mentioned in service request then whay it it showing downtime passed.

secondly, how to cancel the test tenant request. but before cancellation need to know the impact.

entry.title: Inquiry About Free Trials for SAP ERP Integration with Boomi

Hello SAP Community,

I'm currently exploring integration options for SAP ERP with Boomi and was wondering if there are any free trials available for SAP ERP that can be used to connect with Boomi. I would appreciate any information or guidance you can provide on this matter.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 WEB-CLIENT - Cannot find a column is UDF in Op...
entry.content:
I've found the reason for this issue, maybe it's from the UDF definition when the character quantity was over permission. I'd tried to create a new UDF with type Alpha-254length, then I checked at Web-client and it showed.

Hopefully helpful to all of you!

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now - What’s New 2405
entry.content:
Hello

Please so the C_SEN2305 Certification will be updated to C_SEN2405 right ?

entry.title: Re: 404 Error in Learning Journeys
entry.content: All the Learning Journeys are functioning once more. Many thanks for the assistance, @Margit_Wagner!

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the Kolkata SAP Community Group!!!
entry.content: Hi I a new here, how can I get the SAP community ID referred to here ?

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now - What’s New 2405
entry.content:
The name of the certification may be updated but the questions in the certifcation will likely not change immediately.  The certification consists of 100's of questions about SAP Enable Now and SAP Companion functionality and every person who does the certification gets a sample of those questions.  At the moment, none of those questions are likely to relate to changes associated with the 2406 release and even once the 2406 release is available, it may result in a small number of new questions. 

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now - What’s New 2405
entry.content:
Thank you so much for your clarification !

From what I understand the code of the certification will change to C_SEN2406 but the questions will remain the same, right ?

entry.title: Re: How to create custom OData service in S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
@ranjeetkumar07 Thank you for your reply.

I did the same and uploaded in sap public cloud.

The Same Odata when we try using it for making report with the URL of Odata, it works fine.
But when we are trying to make a Form Template or anything else where a Data Source is use, we are not being able to see the Custom Odata/Data Source which we made.

Here are some SS from which data source are being tried to used but it's not visible.

The Objective of showing this picture is that where ever Data Source/Odata Is mentioned, The custom Odata which we made are not visible.

@SAPSupport @ranjeetkumar07 @Sap

entry.title: Re: In a multi-app CAP project, how can I trigger navigat...
entry.content:
Sorry might not be a huge amount of help here but gut feel is that the navigation needs to occur client side rather than server side? 

Idea 1

See: https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/d782acf8bfd74107ad6a04f0361c5f62

Section: Actions Triggering External Navigation

The flow would be something like:

1. App 1 has a UI.DataFieldForIntentBasedNavigation annotation 

2. Upon a user invoking it  App 1 along with the ID navigates to App2

3. App2 invokes your server side action

Idea 2

I wonder if an implementation of a custom action using guided development could do what you needed? 

1. Create Custom Action for the Fiori Elements app

2. In the Handler invoke the action

3. Upon success navigate 

Once again apologies for not being much help, found the question interesting is all

entry.title: Re: Welcome to "SAP Build Apps on SAP BTP" Developer's Challenge- April 1st, 2024!
entry.content:
Hello Developers,
The first week's challenge is posted !
It's about working with S/4HANA Cloud OData services which is a very critical topic...

  • Task 1: OData

entry.title: Re: Exploring SAP Cloud ALM and its functionalities
entry.content: Insightful!

entry.title: SAP Fioriにおけるクリックの制御について
entry.content:
皆様
閲覧いただきありがとうございます。

【背景】
SAP Fioriの画面操作をRPA製品で自動化したいと考えています。その製品はWebページに対してjavascriptを挿入して制御を試みます。

【質問】
SAP Fioriで表示されているボタンやタブをユーザが手動でクリックする操作をjavascriptで実行する方法を教えていただきたいです。
通常のWebページのように以下のように要素に設定されているIDなどのセレクタを元にclick()メソッドを発行しましたが特に反応がない状況です。

試したスクリプト1：
document.getElementById('elementのセレクタ').click();

試したスクリプト2：
event = new CustomEvent('click');
element.dispatchEvent(event);


もしご存じの方がいらっしゃればご教示頂けると大変ありがたいです。
お手数おかけいたしますが宜しくお願い致します。

entry.title: Re: Interested for SIT Kolkata 2024 ?
entry.content:
Hello, please go to https://www.sap.com/india/account/universal-id.html, follow the video, and within 15 minutes you will get your ID. 

 Please join the Kolkata Group 

----- Stay up-to-date with SAP Community and subscribe to What's New today! -----

entry.title: SAP MDK attachment multi image selection at a time for IOS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are unable to select multiple images at a time while using IOS devices. We have used standard attachment control.

This was working fine in the Android version we are able to select multiple images at a time.

Please let anyone come across this issue and any advise how we can achieve this for IOS devices.

@bill_froelich Please advise ?

Thanks,

Krishna.

entry.title: Re: Interested for SIT Kolkata 2024 ?
entry.content:
Hello 
Kindly go to the event page of SAP Inside track Kolkata and show your interest in the top-right option. Please join the Kolkata Group 

----- Stay up-to-date with SAP Community and subscribe to What's New today! -----

entry.title: Re: SAP CPIDS / CIDS: view design time data doesn't show...

Hi,

Do you have any filters in the Transform?
You have the sample size selected as 50 - can you try increasing it to 5000 and then see?

Regards,
Rahul.

entry.title: Re: Interested for SIT Kolkata 2024 ?
entry.content: Give link to the page.

entry.title: Re: router Non-xml condition error as Invalid format of c...
entry.content:
Hi Ravi,

you cannot combine multiple and / or operators in the same expression using parantheses.

I would suggest to use a small groovy script, check the C4C_ContactID and userId there and put the result in a property. After that, use this property in your router condition.

Best regards

Christian

entry.title: SAP CloudALM - Transports for SAP Business Suite
entry.content:
Dear community,

As SAP Solution Manager will be end of life "soon", we're looking at SAP CloudALM to move away from SolMan.

However, while CloudALM has "Cloud Transports" (for CPI and whatnot), I'm wondering if anyone has configured CloudALM for regular vanilla Business Suite (your ERP, Fiori, BW, ...) systems.

Is that even possible or is it a planned feature in the near future? I'm having a hard time finding any information in this regards.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One V10 SQL API
entry.content:
Hi RuanDuPreez,

If you are looking in Service Layer context, I would like to inform you that Service Layer works on MS SQL (Windows) version as well in SAP Business One version 10.0.

Install Service Layer using SAP Business One Component Wizard and try to access the following link: https://SLDSERVER:50000.

It will provide you the list of all the APIs available.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: SAP business Bydesign
entry.content:
Dear customer,

For Inbound Logistics Work Center, delivery type "Customer Return " exists for Inbound Delivery Notifications, Warehouse Requests and Inbound Deliveries Views.  Please view the example under Inbound Delivery Notifications View. There is no single document named Customer Return.

Therefore, could you please let me know which customer return is your referred?

 

Best regards,

Gavan

SAP Support| Logistics Area Support

entry.title: Re: Full update of 0CO_OM_WBS_3 does not work. I get only...
entry.content: Thanks for your help maggie_yi, but note 2880477 is not suitable for our system.

entry.title: ENABLE_SSL in DATABASE
entry.content:
Hi 

We are going to ENABLE_SSL in Database please let us know the impact.

Regards,
SAP BASIS


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: ENABLE_SSL in DATABASE
entry.content:
Suggest you go through the documents below:

3243590 - Performance impact with SSL Configuration for HANA system replication
2943303 - How to configure secure communication Between Primary and Secondary Sites without downtime.
3006410 - How to disable secure communication between Primary and Secondary site without downtime  
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/6b94445c94ae495c83a19646e7c3fd56/ec50b815f5b740d7a9777d80f7104a2c.html

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
Re: add a field from marc table in top-of-page and alv report for CL11(display bom level by level)
entry.content: You don't see "Create implementation" because your cursor is on an enhancement instead of an enhancement option (point or section). You must click on the Enhance button or menu, then click on Show Implicit Enhancement Options, and right click on ENHANCEMENT-POINT to see Create implementation (to create an Enhancement).

entry.title: Re: add a field from marc table in top-of-page and alv re...
entry.content: Please do not post a solution. Instead, click on "show replies" then "comment".

If you have any examples of the second or even the first option that fit this problematic would be highly appreciated.
